items.title: GitHub Copilot Ships App Preview and SDK GA
key_facts: Copilot App (standalone desktop app) opened to all Pro/Pro+/Business/Enterprise subscribers on June 2
Canvases feature: bidirectional work surface where agent and user can edit side-by-side
Cloud automations: schedule recurring agent runs without local machine active
Voice mode uses on-device speech-to-text (no audio leaves device)
Copilot SDK reached GA same day in 6 languages: Node.js/TypeScript, Python, Go, .NET, Rust, Java
SDK supports MCP server connectivity, hook system for agent behavior interception, and BYOK auth
BYOK providers: OpenAI, Microsoft Foundry, Anthropic
Third June 2 release: agentic capabilities added to Copilot CLI and JetBrains IDEs
caveats: Context window up to ~8,000 tokens — limits full-codebase awareness in large monorepos
Developer community reports quality regressions in Copilot suggestion accuracy since late 2025
App in technical preview; production-readiness timeline not disclosed

items.title: OpenAI Codex Adds Role Plugins and Sites Preview
key_facts: 6 role-specific plugins: data analytics, creative production, sales, product design, equity investing, investment banking
Plugins bundle 62 apps and 110 skills; no coding required
Sites preview: build and host interactive web apps via natural language on OpenAI-managed URL
Available to ChatGPT Teams, Pro, and Enterprise plans
June 3 update added annotations for refining AI outputs
caveats: openai.com returned HTTP 403 on all direct fetch attempts during this run
All figures (62 apps, 110 skills) sourced from secondary reporting only
Sites is in preview; GA timeline not disclosed

items.title: Cursor Rolls Out Organizations for Enterprise
key_facts: New Organizations layer generally available to all Enterprise customers on June 3
Three-level hierarchy: Organization (top) → Team → Group (user collections)
Per-team security policies, governance settings, budget limits, and feature flags
Consolidated spend and token usage view rolled up across all teams
Separate usage pools from June 1 pricing restructure apply per team under Org umbrella
caveats: Organizations layer is for Enterprise plan only; Free, Pro, and Teams plans unaffected

items.title: Cursor v3.7 Ships Canvas Design Mode and Context Usage Reports
key_facts: Canvas Design Mode: users point at live UI elements in Agents Window browser to annotate and select
Agent locates and rewrites corresponding source components from the annotated context
Requires development server running and app loaded in Agents Window
Context Usage Reports: renders token distribution across session as interactive canvas
Reports show which files/code regions consumed context budget; allows scope pruning before reruns
caveats: Design Mode requires a running dev server and app in Agents Window; does not work on static screenshots or external URLs
No independent reproduction of Design Mode performance found at publication time

items.title: GitHub Copilot Chat for Pull Requests Reaches General Availability
key_facts: Moved from public preview to GA on June 4
Available to all GitHub Copilot license holders at no additional cost
Side-by-side diff and chat interface: eliminates window-toggling during PR review
Automatic repository and diff context improves accuracy of review questions
Access: 'Ask about this diff' button, Copilot nav button, or highlight + dropdown

limitations: Previous bulletin overlap: major Build 2026 items (Scout, MAI, Windsurf/Devin Desktop, Anthropic actions) covered on 2026-06-04
openai.com returned HTTP 403 on all direct fetch attempts; Codex item graded secondary
Login-walled coverage: X timelines, IG, LinkedIn, Discord not accessed directly
Category gap — model-release: no major model released in window; Gemini 3.5 Pro, Grok V9-Medium, Claude Mythos 1 not yet shipped
Category gap — workflow-automation, mcp-ecosystem, research-papers, policy-regulation: no items confirmed for June 2-5
Category gap — productivity-ai breadth: no Notion/Linear/Granola/Mem.ai launch in window beyond Codex plugins
All capability claims from vendor changelogs only; no independent benchmarks cited
Geographic bias: SEA/Indonesia search yielded .ai.id domain item (dropped); US/EU heavy
